reviews.review_description: Nothing like how it looks like in photos , it has mobile game graphics, not fun, some functions don’t even work, you waste your money playing this, I want a refund this game sucks, I’ve played mobile games better then this, if there was a way to review zero stars I would
This game is a scam the trailer makes it look like one of the most realistic vr game ever made when you play it the graphics are crap and you can’t change them
Its a terrible game the graphics are like a mobile game and theres no freeplay dont waste ur money i would like a refund please

Although this game is still early acess, the quality and promise of this games success online and in the description was horrific. The quality of this game feels like something you'd find on an unblocked website on your school computer. This game should be worth $0.50 maximum.

The game sucks I was looking for a actually good game but this is just crap and the Pics don't even show the real game also the graphics suck

This game sucks major donkey balls. This game should be illegal of how bad it is to new buyers don't buy this game buy something worth your time and money which I want back after playing this onward is better

I’m sorry but this is hot garbage.  This looks NOTHING like the trailer! This doesn’t even have Onward level graphics, let alone “realistic” graphics.  Also the Bodycam Mode, which is the default it loads you into, is literally unplayable. It’ll make you throw up from nausea after 10 seconds.  There’s nothing in this game that resembles the description. I honestly hate leaving 1 star reviews but this is downright false advertising
I got bated in to buying the game from the trailer and it was a whole different game than in the trailer.

I waited a long time to play this game and now it’s very frustrating and disappointing, I hope they will change it to be realistic as the trailer showing us very soon and to fixes all bugs and problems because as the trailer seems to be the best game that came out of all times

I absolutely hate this game. It’s trash and doesn’t even have good graphics the people in the game walk like there insanely high on the bad stuff and the again about the graphics, wasn’t this meant to be game changing graphics? It’s absolutely horrible and not worth buying, this should be free 😂
